description_long: This is a beaded necklace displayed on a white mannequin bust. The necklace features a series of rounded, disc-shaped beads in a variety of colors, including red, white, brown, and gray, strung together in a symmetrical pattern. The beads appear to be made from a mix of materials, possibly ceramic, glass, or stone, and are separated by smaller metallic or neutral-toned spacer beads. The necklace is held together by a thin, metallic chain or wire that loops around the back of the bust. The overall design is vibrant and eclectic, with a focus on the colorful arrangement of the beads. The display bust is smooth, matte, and serves as a neutral background to highlight the jewelry.
description: A colorful beaded necklace with disc-shaped beads in red, white, brown, and gray, strung on a thin metallic chain and displayed on a white bust. The design is vibrant and eclectic, emphasizing the varied bead colors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full arrangement of colorful beads and the symmetrical design of the necklace.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the necklace and the curvature of the display bust.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the thin metallic chain and the back of the display bust, with no beads visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the necklace's profile and the arrangement of beads along the side.
